top_articles.title: Vulnerabilities Patched in CrowdStrike, Tenable Products
top_articles.summary: CrowdStrike has fixed a critical LogScale vulnerability, while Tenable addressed a high-severity Nessus flaw.

top_articles.title: Hackers exploit file upload bug in Breeze Cache WordPress plugin
top_articles.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in the Breeze Cache plugin for WordPress that allows uploading arbitrary files on the server without authentication.

top_articles.title: Recent Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Exploited as Zero-Day
top_articles.summary: The flaw allows attackers to access the SAM database, extract NTLM hashes, and gain System privileges.

top_articles.title: Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape

top_articles.title: 22 BRIDGE:BREAK Flaws Expose Thousands of Lantronix and Silex Serial-to-IP Converters

top_articles.title: Microsoft releases emergency patches for critical ASP.NET flaw
top_articles.summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band (OOB) security updates to patch a critical ASP.NET Core privilege escalation vulnerability.

top_articles.title: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers vulnerable to spoofing attacks
top_articles.summary: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers exposed online remain unpatched against a spoofing vulnerability that was exploited as a zero-day and is still being abused in ongoing attacks.
